title: Chopper Project JSON
description: Reproducible project-specific selection file. Captures the exact base, features, and ordering used for a trim run.

domain.description: Domain identifier. In v1 operators are expected to invoke Chopper from the domain root, so this field is a consistency and audit identifier that must match the current working directory basename.

owner.description: Domain deployment owner for this project

release_branch.description: Git branch name for this project trim

base.description: Path to the base JSON file relative to the current working directory / domain root (forward slashes only, no '..', no '//', no absolute paths).

features.description: List of feature JSON paths relative to the current working directory / domain root (forward slashes only, no '..', no '//', no absolute paths). Features are purely additive — their contributions union with the base and with each other, and excludes from one feature never remove content contributed by the base or another feature. Order is authoritative for F3 `flow_actions` sequencing only: when multiple features inject steps/stages against a common reference via `add_step_before`/`add_step_after`/`add_stage_before`/`add_stage_after`, earlier features are applied first so later features see and can target the cumulative F3 result. F1/F2 merges (files and procedures) are order-independent. If a feature declares `depends_on`, each prerequisite feature must also be selected and must appear earlier in this list.

notes.description: Human-readable notes explaining feature ordering or selection rationale
